name: PAX USB-C Fast-Charging Wall Charger
summary: Ensure your customers can keep their PAX Flow Vaporiser powered up with the official PAX USB-C Fast Charging Wall Charger.
description: Ensure your customers can keep their PAX Flow Vaporiser powered up with the official PAX USB-C Fast Charging Wall Charger. Built for speed, reliability, and durability, this charger delivers optimal power output to minimise downtime and maintain peak device performance. Authentic PAX Labs product – sourced directly from the manufacturer for guaranteed compatibility. Keeps your device charged and ready.
